scheme_name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
page_title: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender

details: The "Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender" scheme was introduced by the Social Justice and Empowerment Department, Government of Rajasthan. It aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies.
benefits: Scholarship @ ₹1,000/- per month per student for 10 months.
The scholarship amount is directly transferred to the beneficiary's bank account.
eligibility: The applicant should be a resident of Rajasthan.
The applicant should belong to the transgender community.
The applicant should be studying at the post-matric level.
The applicant should be enrolled in a recognized school/college in Rajasthan.
The applicant’s family annual income should not exceed ₹8,00,000/-.

offline: The applicant/parents/guardians must fill out the scholarship application form and attach the required documents.
Submit the complete application form to their school principal/institution.
The school principal/institution verifies the application and forwards it to the Social Justice and Empowerment Department's district office.
The district office verifies the documents and approves/rejects the application within one month.
Upon approval, the scholarship amount is transferred to the applicant's bank account.

documents_required: Certificate of Enrollment in a Recognized Institution/School

faqs.question: Who is eligible for this scholarship?
faqs.answer: Transgender students who are residents of Rajasthan and enrolled in post-matric education.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance provided?
faqs.answer: A monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- for 10 months.

faqs.question: Can students from other states apply?
faqs.answer: No, only residents of Rajasthan are eligible.

faqs.question: How is the scholarship amount disbursed?
faqs.answer: Through Direct Bank Transfer (DBT) to the applicant's account.

faqs.question: Is this scholarship available for all courses?
faqs.answer: Yes, as long as the course is post-matric and recognized.

faqs.question: Can students apply online?
faqs.answer: Currently, the application process is offline through the school/institution.

faqs.question: When will I receive the scholarship amount?
faqs.answer: Within one month of application approval.

faqs.question: Is there any reservation or preference?
faqs.answer: No specific reservations, but all eligible transgender students are encouraged to apply.

faqs.question: How can I apply for the scholarship?
faqs.answer: Submit the application to your institution, which will forward it to the district office.

faqs.question: What documents are required for the application?
faqs.answer: Transgender Identity Card, enrollment certificate, previous year marksheet, Aadhaar card, income certificate, domicile proof, and bank details.

faqs.question: Can the scholarship be renewed annually?
faqs.answer: Yes, subject to continued eligibility and academic progress.
